product_overview: TorcaV is a professional mobile Wi‑Fi analyzer built in Flutter to provide real‑time scanning, security assessment, network discovery (nmap), channel recommendations, signal heatmaps, reporting and background monitoring with push notifications.
core_goals: Provide reliable multi-pass real‑time Wi‑Fi scanning with signal averaging and automatic backend fallback (iw/nmcli).
Deliver actionable security assessments (encryption, rogue AP detection, handshake capture) and integrate nmap-based network discovery.
Offer channel occupancy analysis, channel recommendations, speed test and signal heatmaps with historical trend storage and exportable reports.
Support continuous background monitoring and alerting (email/Telegram/webhook/push) with configurable thresholds and rate limiting.
Ship a responsive, dark-theme mobile dashboard (Flutter) using clean architecture (BLoC), with local persistence (Hive/SQLite) and unit/widget tests.

features.name: Real-time Wi‑Fi Scanning
features.description: Perform multi-pass scans across interfaces, return networks with averaged signal strengths, support backend fallback and live streaming of scan results.
user_flows: POST /api/scan/start with interface=wlan0 and backend=nmcli and mode=passive -> Receive 202 with scan_id
GET /api/scan/stream/{scan_id} with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 stream with network events (SSID,BSSID,signal_dbm,channel)
POST /api/scan/stop/{scan_id} -> Receive 200 with status=stopped
POST /api/scan/start without root_privileges -> Receive 403 with error='insufficient_privileges'
POST /api/scan/start with unsupported_backend=bogus -> Receive 422 with error='unsupported_backend' -> GET /api/scan/status returns 404 for failed scan

features.name: Security Assessment
features.description: Analyze networks for encryption type, detect rogue APs / evil twins, deauth events, capture WPA handshakes and provide per-network risk scoring.
user_flows: POST /api/security/analyze with bssid=AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF and capture_handshake=true -> Receive 202 with analysis_id
GET /api/security/results/{analysis_id} -> Receive 200 with {encryption: 'WPA2', risk_score: 72, rogue_ap: false, handshake_captured: true}
POST /api/security/monitor/start with thresholds and alert_targets -> Receive 202 with monitor_id
POST /api/security/analyze with malformed_bssid=invalid -> Receive 400 with error='invalid_bssid' -> GET /api/security/results/{invalid_id} -> Receive 404

features.name: Nmap Network Scanning
features.description: Perform LAN host discovery and deep scans using nmap profiles (fast/balanced/aggressive), return host/service fingerprints and vulnerability findings.
user_flows: POST /api/nmap/scan with target=192.168.1.0/24 and profile=fast -> Receive 202 with job_id
GET /api/nmap/results/{job_id} -> Receive 200 with hosts array ({ip,mac,os,open_ports,vulns})
POST /api/nmap/scan with target=192.168.1.100 and profile=aggressive -> Receive 202 with job_id
POST /api/nmap/scan with invalid_target=not_an_ip -> Receive 422 with error='invalid_target' -> GET /api/nmap/results/{bad_job_id} -> Receive 404

features.name: Channel Occupancy & Recommendation
features.description: Analyze channel occupancy and congestion across 2.4/5/6GHz bands and provide recommended channels to reduce interference.
user_flows: GET /api/channel/occupancy?band=5GHz -> Receive 200 with channel_stats (channel,utilization,noise,connected_count)
POST /api/channel/recommendation with ssid=HomeNet and current_channel=36 and location=indoor -> Receive 200 with recommended_channel=40 and confidence=0.86
GET /api/channel/occupancy?band=6GHz -> Receive 200 with channel_stats
GET /api/channel/occupancy?band=7GHz -> Receive 400 with error='unsupported_band' -> POST /api/channel/recommendation without ssid -> Receive 422 with error='missing_parameter'

features.name: Signal Heatmaps & Historical Trends
features.description: Collect geo-tagged RSSI points to generate session-based heatmaps and store historical signal trends for analysis and visualization.
user_flows: POST /api/heatmap/start with session_meta={name:'office_walk',band:'2.4GHz'} -> Receive 202 with session_id
POST /api/heatmap/point with session_id and lat=... and lon=... and rssi=-62 -> Receive 201 with point_id
GET /api/heatmap/{session_id} -> Receive 200 with geojson heatmap and summary_stats
POST /api/heatmap/start when storage_quota_exceeded -> Receive 507 with error='insufficient_storage' -> POST /api/heatmap/point with invalid_session_id -> Receive 404

features.name: Alerting & Notifications
features.description: Subscribe to real‑time alerts for security events, deauth attacks, threshold breaches; deliver via email/Telegram/webhook/push with rate limiting.
user_flows: POST /api/alerts/subscribe with method=telegram and destination=@channel_bot and filters={risk_score>80} -> Receive 201 with subscription_id
POST /api/alerts/test/{subscription_id} -> Receive 200 with delivered=true
POST /api/alerts/subscribe with method=unsupported_sms -> Receive 400 with error='unsupported_notification_method' -> POST /api/alerts/test/invalid -> Receive 404

features.name: Reports & Data Export
features.description: Generate exportable PDF/JSON/HTML reports from scan sessions, security analyses and nmap results; support session saving, comparison and download.
user_flows: POST /api/reports/generate with format=pdf and resources=[scan_id,analysis_id] -> Receive 202 with report_id
GET /api/reports/status/{report_id} -> Receive 200 with status=ready
GET /api/reports/download/{report_id} -> Receive 200 with Content-Type=application/pdf and binary payload
POST /api/reports/generate with format=exe -> Receive 400 with error='unsupported_format' -> GET /api/reports/download/{bad_id} -> Receive 404

features.name: Dashboard UI
features.description: Mobile dashboard showing overview widgets (live scan, recent alerts, throughput) with dark/light theme and responsive layout.
user_flows: GET /api/dashboard/overview -> Receive 200 with widgets={live_scans,alerts,throughput,channel_map}
GET /api/dashboard/widget/scan_history?limit=20 -> Receive 200 with recent_scans array
POST /api/ui/theme with theme=dark -> Receive 200 with preference_saved
GET /api/dashboard/overview when backend_unavailable -> Receive 503 with error='service_unavailable' -> GET /api/dashboard/widget/scan_history -> Receive 500

features.name: Background Monitoring & Daemon Management
features.description: Start/stop background monitoring with IDS/IPS mode, handle privilege escalation, and manage running monitors with status and logs.
user_flows: POST /api/monitor/start with policy=IDS and thresholds={deauth_rate:5/min} -> Receive 202 with monitor_id
GET /api/monitor/status/{monitor_id} -> Receive 200 with state=running and metrics
POST /api/monitor/stop/{monitor_id} -> Receive 200 with state=stopped
POST /api/monitor/start without required_thresholds -> Receive 422 with error='missing_thresholds' -> GET /api/monitor/status/unknown -> Receive 404
